description_short: Generate ASCII art, Mermaid diagrams, and compact flow visualizations of attack paths.
description_long: Renders attack path data from risk assessments or threat models into visual formats: detailed ASCII art box-and-arrow diagrams with control effectiveness bars, Mermaid flowcharts for markdown/GitHub rendering with color-coded protection status, compact single-line flow diagrams, and control coverage matrices. Accepts structured stage data with controls, gaps, and MITRE ATT&CK technique IDs.
author: Event Mill Contributors
